## Epic

Page Design Issues (Dummy Data Only)

## Description

- Create reusable skeleton components matching final layouts
- Add presets for dashboard, forms, tables, cards, and modals
- Ensure skeletons are used consistently in mock async views
- Design spec (must use; measurable):
  - Tokens per Issue 3
  - Skeleton dimensions match final components +/- 4px tolerance
  - Animation duration between 1.2s and 1.8s
  - Reduced-motion users receive static skeletons

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Skeleton components documented and reusable
- [ ] Integrated on all major screens
- [ ] Reduced-motion behavior implemented
- [ ] PR includes before/after screenshots for loading states
